arts.ttl: Wilshere explains why he swapped Arsenal for Norwich City
arts.sum: Jack Wilshere has explained why the opportunity to work with Johannes Hoff Thorup convinced him to swap Arsenal for Norwich City.

arts.ttl: O’Nien returns: Sunderland team news and predicted XI to face Norwich City
arts.sum: The latest Sunderland team news as Regis Le Bris' side gear up to face Norwich City in the Championship. The post O’Nien returns: Sunderland team news and predicted XI to face Norwich City appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
